title: CLK_POLARITY set 0 for memrd and memwr cells on inferred memory

features.name: inferred dual_port async read memory
features.description: Code should include an inferred memory cell from a register array with separate read and write ports where asynchronous read behavior is incorrectly inferred

features.name: memory inference with missing enable detection
features.description: Code should include an inferred memory read cell where EN signal is not properly connected to the read enable condition

features.name: inferred memory with incorrect CLK_POLARITY
features.description: Code should include an inferred memory cell where the clock polarity parameter is incorrectly set to 0 for a posedge-based operation

features.name: inferred memory with incorrect CLK_ENABLE
features.description: Code should include an inferred memory cell where the clock enable parameter is incorrectly set to 0 for a synchronous operation
